context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: The route panel's speed input should default to the configurable ROUTE_DEFAULT_SPEED_KNOTS, so the page must inject it like it already injects the playback interval.
implementation: Add a second placeholder replacement for {{ROUTE_DEFAULT_SPEED}} alongside the existing {{PLAY_INTERVAL_MS}} injection; no structural change.
